title: cyclone operation
description: Gas-solid cyclone separator. Computes the cut diameter d50, the grade-efficiency curve η(d), the collection efficiency and the pressure drop ΔP. The collection correlation is selectable via the `model` keyword. Requires a feed particle-size distribution and a gas-viscosity model.

bodyDiameter.title: Body diameter D_c
bodyDiameter.description: Cyclone body diameter; sets the inlet area and width of the Lapple standard geometry.

numberOfTurns.title: Effective turns N_e
numberOfTurns.description: Effective number of gas revolutions; more turns give a finer cut.

C.title: Leith-Licht constant C
C.description: Geometric-configuration constant for the Leith-Licht model.

beta.title: Logistic slope β
beta.description: Grade-efficiency slope for the Iozia-Leith, Barth and Muschelknautz models; Lapple is the β = 2 case.

alpha.title: Barth tangential factor α
alpha.description: Tangential-velocity factor v_θ = α·v_i on the control surface (Barth model).

heightFactor.title: Barth CS height factor
heightFactor.description: Control-surface height H_cs/D_c for the Barth model.

cLimit.title: Muschelknautz limit loading
cLimit.description: Limit solids loading c_lim for the Muschelknautz mass-loading effect; surplus solids above it are separated near 100 %.
